title: Berchemia zeyheri
taxonomy: Berchemia zeyheri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to southern Africa, specifically in countries such as South Africa and Mozambique. The plant is a shrub or small tree, typically growing up to 6 meters in height. Berchemia zeyheri is further classified as belonging to the genus Berchemia. Its classification is part of the larger taxonomy of the Rhamnaceae family, which includes various other species of buckthorns and allies.
uses: Berchemia zeyheri is a plant species that has been traditionally used in various medicinal applications.
